reviews.comment:
El expendio de combustible muy bueno. Pero otra cosa es el Full, si una estación de servicio del ACA en ruta te cierran la cocina a ¡¡las 22hs!! algo está mal!. Y para completarla no les funcionaba el sistema de Serviclub.

(Translated by Google)
Fuel sales are very good. But Full Service is another matter. If an ACA service station on the route closes its kitchen at 10 p.m., something's wrong! And to fill up, the Serviclub system didn't work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURveUxpRzlnRRAB
